title: High Sky's Multiplayer Fantasy
description: It is a modification designed to add maps and utility features for easier exploration
body:
High Sky’s Multiplayer – Utility & Customization Modpack

High Sky’s Multiplayer is a lightweight reminder-focused modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience through client-side quality-of-life improvements, information tools, and customization options. It works great in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments (where permitted by server rules).

Features

Minimap & World Awareness
Navigate your world with ease using a detailed minimap and optional on-screen information.

Recipe Viewing & Crafting Support
Quickly view crafting recipes and item uses to simplify complex builds.

Inventory & UI Enhancements
Shulker box previews, item tooltips, food information, zoom options, and improved chat features.

Combat & Gameplay Tweaks
Additional visual indicators and stats to help you better understand combat and equipment.

Highly Customizable
Most features include toggles and settings so you can tailor the experience to your playstyle.

Important Notes

This modpack is client-side focused and does not bypass server protections.

Always follow the rules of the server you are playing on.

Some features may be disabled or restricted on certain multiplayer servers.

Intended for players who enjoy customization, convenience, and enhanced gameplay clarity.

Why Choose High Sky’s Multiplayer?

Small pack size

Performance-friendly

Easy to customize

Works smoothly with modern Minecraft versions
